MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SOUTHERN INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE. No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for pro hac vice admission of Gregory M. McNamee is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to the court a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Continued To Apr-22-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. Matter is not contested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SOUTHERN INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Off calendar. The motion was not filed and served 16 court days in advance of the hearing date, with additional time for service by regular mail. (See Code Civ. Proc., sec. 1005, subd. (b).)

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SOUTHERN INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for pro hac vice admission of Gregory M. McNamee is ordered off calendar for untimely notice. (See Code Civ. Proc., sec. 1005, subd. (b).) In addition, the McNamee declaration does not contain a form of certification that conforms to Code of Civil Procedure, section 2015.5.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
